title: Bridge Essay: Mental Imagery: Functional Mechanisms and Clinical Applications.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal** (Phase 10) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Imaginal to mechanistic neuroscience through Mental, Imagery:, Functional, Mechanisms, and.

**Mental Imagery: Functional Mechanisms and Clinical Applications.** — Trends Cogn Sci. PMID: 26412097. DOI: 10.1016/j.tics.2015.08.003. Mental imagery research has weathered both disbelief of the phenomenon and inherent methodological limitations. Here we review recent behavioral, brain imaging, and clinical research that has reshaped our understanding of mental imagery. Research supports the claim that visual mental imagery is adepictive internal representation that functions like aweak form of perception.
